mapper.sql: t.apply_id, t.apply_no, t.reg_id, t.patient_id, t.doctor_id, t.item_id, t.clinical_info, t.status, t.treat_doctor_id, t.treat_result, t.treat_time, t.create_time, t.update_time
mapper.select: SELECT , p.patient_name, p.patient_no, p.gender, p.age, du.real_name AS doctor_name, ti.item_name, ti.item_code, ti.item_price, tu.real_name AS treat_doctor_name FROM treatment_apply t LEFT JOIN patient p ON t.patient_id = p.patient_id LEFT JOIN sys_user du ON t.doctor_id = du.user_id LEFT JOIN treatment_item ti ON t.item_id = ti.item_id LEFT JOIN sys_user tu ON t.treat_doctor_id = tu.user_id WHERE t.apply_id = #{applyId}

SELECT , p.patient_name, p.patient_no, p.gender, p.age, du.real_name AS doctor_name, ti.item_name, ti.item_code, ti.item_price, tu.real_name AS treat_doctor_name FROM treatment_apply t LEFT JOIN patient p ON t.patient_id = p.patient_id LEFT JOIN sys_user du ON t.doctor_id = du.user_id LEFT JOIN treatment_item ti ON t.item_id = ti.item_id LEFT JOIN sys_user tu ON t.treat_doctor_id = tu.user_id WHERE t.reg_id = #{regId} ORDER BY t.apply_id

SELECT , p.patient_name, p.patient_no, p.gender, p.age, du.real_name AS doctor_name, ti.item_name, ti.item_code, ti.item_price, tu.real_name AS treat_doctor_name FROM treatment_apply t LEFT JOIN patient p ON t.patient_id = p.patient_id LEFT JOIN sys_user du ON t.doctor_id = du.user_id LEFT JOIN treatment_item ti ON t.item_id = ti.item_id LEFT JOIN sys_user tu ON t.treat_doctor_id = tu.user_id WHERE t.patient_id = #{patientId} AND t.status = #{status} ORDER BY t.create_time DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO treatment_apply (apply_no, reg_id, patient_id, doctor_id, item_id, clinical_info, status) VALUES (#{applyNo}, #{regId}, #{patientId}, #{doctorId}, #{itemId}, #{clinicalInfo}, #{status})
mapper.update: UPDATE treatment_apply SET status = #{status} WHERE apply_id = #{applyId}
